name: Sorcerer of Sebek
name_jp: セベクの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 Effect Monsters
When this card or your monster this card points to inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can gain that much LP. If a player gains LP, even during the Damage Step: You can make each player take 1000 damage. You can only use each effect of "Sorcerer of Sebek" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
2 Effect Monsters
When this card or your monster this card points to inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can gain that much LP. If a player gains LP, even during the Damage Step: You can make each player take 1000 damage. You can only use each effect of "Sorcerer of Sebek" once per turn.
eff:
2 Effect Monsters
When this card or your monster this card points to inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can gain that much LP. If a player gains LP, even during the Damage Step: You can make each player take 1000 damage. You can only use each effect of "Sorcerer of Sebek" once per turn.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
Activates if you gain Life Points
Activates if your opponent gains Life Points
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
